title: The Glass Pavilion
description: A study in transparency and light. We merged interior modular kitchen design with large expansive living areas, utilizing floor-to-ceiling glass to dissolve the boundary between the sanctuary of the home and the rugged nature outside.

title: Minimalist Retreat
description: Seamless integration of indoor and outdoor environments, featuring luxury wooden floorings imported directly from Scandinavia. The space breathes through intentional negative space and monolithic stone features.

title: Urban Oasis
description: Maximizing limited city space creating an illusion of infinite expanses through strategic bathroom fitting curation, monolithic wall placements, and hidden atmospheric lighting.

title: The Monolith
description: A brutalist approach softened by warm interior lighting and expansive wooden elements. The Monolith stands as a stark contrast to its environment while offering absolute warmth within.

title: Heritage Restored
description: Breathing modern minimalism into a 19th-century estate. We preserved the original skeletal structure while introducing ultra-modern kitchen and lounge facilities.

title: Solitude Cabin
description: Designed for complete detachment. This structure utilizes raw concrete and blackened timber to create a perfectly silent retreat for meditation and focus.
